Progress Report On The Status Of The Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account.
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action - Minor
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Ara Jabagchourian, Esq. appeared with petitioner Jennifer Schnoebelen, who was present via telephone as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Mark Schnoebelen, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Schnoebelen as Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on January 5, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $100,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $24,373.71.
Medical Bills - $9,714.35.
Costs - $2,505.15.

The net balance of $63,406.79 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Frost Bank, located at 100 West Houston Street, San Antonio, TX, 78205. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to May 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.
